name: Enneacraft - Asta.PIXEA
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>糾罪巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エニアクラフト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａｓｔａγ．ＰＩＸＩＥＡ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アスタピクシア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Each time a monster(s) is flipped face-up, place 1 E.C. Counter on this card. At the end of the Battle Phase, if you have an "Enneacraft" card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less ATK than this card; destroy it.

[ Monster Effect ] 
After this card was flipped face-up, while it is in the Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target cards in the field or GYs with card effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) you control (Quick Effect): You can change this face-down card to face-up Defense Position; negate that effect, then you can banish (face-down) 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand in face-down Defense Position. You cannot Special Summon the turn you activate this effect, except in face-down Defense Position.
pend_eff: Each time a monster(s) is flipped face-up, place 1 E.C. Counter on this card. At the end of the Battle Phase, if you have an "Enneacraft" card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less ATK than this card; destroy it.

When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) you control (Quick Effect): You can change this face-down card to face-up Defense Position; negate that effect, then you can banish (face-down) 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand in face-down Defense Position. You cannot Special Summon the turn you activate this effect, except in face-down Defense Position.
eff: After this card was flipped face-up, while it is in the Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target cards in the field or GYs with card effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) you control (Quick Effect): You can change this face-down card to face-up Defense Position; negate that effect, then you can banish (face-down) 1 random card from your opponent's hand. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand in face-down Defense Position. action: Activates if other Pendulum Zone is occupied by specific card
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
Flip monster without a Flip effect
